message:
✨ Normalize product types for H2O Plants supplier (#8)

- Normalize productType to uppercase in groupProductsByType() and
  extractFacets() so mixed-case types from H2O Plants (Plant, Driftwood)
  merge with uppercase types from Danaqua (PLANTS, DRIFTWOOD)
- Add PLANT, GARDEN PLANTS, AQUATIC PLANTS, PACKING MATERIALS to
  PRODUCT_TYPE_LABELS mapping
- Update Plants nav link to include all plant-related type variants
- Use dynamic vendor names in collection descriptions instead of
  hardcoding "Danaqua Live Fish & More"

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -40,7 +40,7 @@ export const REVALIDATE_SECONDS = 300;
 /** Navigation links */
 export const NAV_LINKS = [
   { label: "Shop", href: "/collections" },
-  { label: "Plants", href: "/collections?cat=LIVE+PLANTS,PLANTS" },
+  { label: "Plants", href: "/collections?cat=LIVE+PLANTS,PLANTS,PLANT,GARDEN+PLANTS,AQUATIC+PLANTS" },
   { label: "Driftwood", href: "/collections?cat=DRIFTWOOD" },
   { label: "Guides", href: "/guides" },
   { label: "Automation", href: "/guides?category=automation" },
